# Task

## Goal

What needs to be done?

## Context

Links to issue, spec, or related files.

## Constraints

- Do not change unrelated modules.
- Follow `AGENTS.md` and project rules.
- Reuse existing components and utilities.

## Implementation notes

Optional technical hints or edge cases.

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm verify`
- [ ] `pnpm verify:full` if needed
- [ ] Manual browser check if UI changed

## Done when

Clear completion definition for the agent or developer.
